Bash(docker exec eve-web-api-gpu-8892 python -c "
try:
    from eve_comfyui_cloud_connector import EveComfyUICloudClient, EMOTIONS
    client = EveComfyUICloudClient\(\)
    print\('IMPORT: OK'\)
    print\(f'AVAILABLE: {client.is_available\(\)}'\)
    print\(f'API_KEY: {bool\(client.api_key\)}'\)
    print\(f'EMOTIONS: {list\(EMOTIONS.keys\(\)\)}'\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f'IMPORT FAILED: {e}'\)
")
Bash(docker exec eve-web-api-gpu-8892 grep -n "Grok.*LoRA pipeline" /app/eve_api_docker_versoin.py | head -10)

Bash(docker exec eve-web-api-gpu-8892 python -c "
import os
print\('COMFY_CLOUD_API_KEY set:', bool\(os.getenv\('COMFY_CLOUD_API_KEY'\)\)\)
print\('XAI_API_KEY set:', bool\(os.getenv\('XAI_API_KEY'\)\)\)
# Check .env file
try:
    with open\('/app/.env'\) as f:
        for line in f:
            if 'XAI' in line.upper\(\) or 'GROK' in line.upper\(\) or 'COMFY' in line.upper\(\):
                key = line.split\('='\)[0].strip\(\)
                val = line.split\('=', 1\)[1].strip\(\) if '=' in line else ''
                print\(f'{key}: {\\"set\\" if val else \\"empty\\"} \({len\(val\)} chars\)'\)
except:
    print\('.env not found at /app/.env'\)
")

Bash(docker exec eve-web-api-gpu-8892 python -c "
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(\)
import os
xai = os.getenv\('XAI_API_KEY', ''\)
grok = os.getenv\('GROK_API_KEY', ''\)
print\(f'XAI_API_KEY: {bool\(xai\)} \({len\(xai\)} chars\)'\)
print\(f'GROK_API_KEY: {bool\(grok\)} \({len\(grok\)} chars\)'\)
# Check all env vars with xai or grok
for k, v in os.environ.items\(\):
    if 'xai' in k.lower\(\) or 'grok' in k.lower\(\):
        print\(f'{k}: set \({len\(v\)} chars\)'\)
")

        if l and not l.startswith\('#'\) and \('xai' in l.lower\(\) or 'grok' in l.lower\(\)\):

Bash(docker exec eve-web-api-gpu-8892 python -c "
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(\)
import os, requests
key = os.getenv\('COMFY_CLOUD_API_KEY', ''\)
s = requests.Session\(\)
s.headers.update\({'X-API-Key': key, 'Content-Type': 'application/json'}\)
# Check if upload endpoint exists
r = s.get\('https://cloud.comfy.org/api/upload/image', timeout=5\)
print\(f'GET /api/upload/image: {r.status_code}'\)
# Also try POST with no data
r2 = s.post\('https://cloud.comfy.org/api/upload/image', timeout=5\)
print\(f'POST /api/upload/image: {r2.status_code} {r2.text[:200]}'\)
")

Bash(docker exec eve-web-api-gpu-8892 python -c "
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(\)
import os, requests
key = os.getenv\('XAI_API_KEY'\)
r = requests.post\('https://api.x.ai/v1/images/generations',
    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': f'Bearer {key}'},
    json={'model': 'grok-imagine-image', 'prompt': 'A glowing crystal lotus flower', 'n': 1},
    timeout=60\)
print\(f'Status: {r.status_code}'\)
if r.status_code == 200:
    data = r.json\(\)
    url = data.get\('data', [{}]\)[0].get\('url', 'NO URL'\)
    print\(f'Image URL: {url[:100]}...'\)
else:
    print\(f'Error: {r.text[:300]}'\)
" 2>&1)

import subprocess
# Check if the Flask process was restarted after our code changes
result = subprocess.run\(['ps', 'aux'], capture_output=True, text=True\)
for line in result.stdout.split\('\\n'\):
    if 'python' in line.lower\(\) or 'flask' in line.lower\(\) or 'gunicorn' in line.lower\(\):
        print\(line\)
")
